title: Template
body:
{{box | title="Dr. Gregory Mouse" | img="https://static.klipy.com/ii/4e7bea9f7a3371424e6c16ebc93252fe/44/a8/Ss9CycVW6UU9k.gif" | caption="Dr House Ratte" | section="General information" | "Aliases"="Dr. Mouse, Gregory Mouse, Mouse MD"}}
**Gregory House** is a fictional character and the titular protagonist of the American medical drama series *House*[ref:https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/House_(TV_series)]. Created by *David Shore* and portrayed by English actor *Hugh Laurie*, he leads a team of diagnosticians and is the Head of Diagnostic Medicine at the fictional *Princeton-Plainsboro Teaching Hospital* in *Princeton, New Jersey*. House's character has been described as a *misanthrope*, *cynic*, *narcissist*, *nihilist* and *curmudgeon*.
